org.apache.juneau.commons.bean
Bean-modeling layer for Juneau.

    Description
    static final BeanMetaInitializer
    BeanMetaInitializer.NOOP
    Singleton commons-side default — no marshalling-side knowledge.

    Description

    BeanConfigContext.Builder
